touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn outreach to Ruby Moore at CloudSpark regarding revenue forecasting challenges in fintech. No response received.
Follow-up LinkedIn message to Ruby Moore sharing case study on forecast accuracy improvement for fintech companies. No response.
Third LinkedIn message to Ruby Moore referencing mutual connection and offering quick chat about RevOps automation. No response.
Cold call attempt to Ruby Moore, reached voicemail. Left message about improving forecast accuracy for fast-growing fintech teams.
Cold email to Ruby Moore outlining how similar fintech companies reduced forecast error by 40% using automated deal intelligence. No response.
LinkedIn message to Ruby Moore with video testimonial from fintech Head of Sales on forecasting improvements. No response.
Email to Ruby Moore offering free forecast health assessment. Ruby responded expressing interest in learning more about automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, native Salesforce integration with real-time sync

next_steps: Schedule intro call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Calendar invite sent to Ruby Moore for qualification call with Calendly link and prep questions. No response to confirmation.
Brief qualification call with Ruby. Discussed CloudSpark's current forecasting process using spreadsheets. Ruby mentioned they're exploring solutions and looking at Gong as well.

questions_asked.question: What's your biggest challenge with forecast accuracy today?
questions_asked.answer: Manual data entry and no visibility into deal health signals

questions_asked.question: How does your automation compare to Gong?
questions_asked.answer: We focus on deal-level automation vs conversation intelligence, but can complement each other

next_steps: Ruby to check calendar for deeper discovery call

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message thanking Ruby for the intro call and sharing product overview deck. No response.

Qualification call with Ruby covering CloudSpark's tech stack, team size (10 AEs), and current RevOps workflows. Ruby confirmed budget authority and mentioned wanting to involve Amara Almeida from her team. Discussed timeline to improve forecasting before Q3 planning.

questions_asked.question: What does success look like for a forecasting solution in 6 months?
questions_asked.answer: 75%+ forecast accuracy and automated weekly reporting to exec team

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in the evaluation?
questions_asked.answer: Amara Almeida handles technical evaluation and will test integrations

questions_asked.question: Can you support 10 users on the platform?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have flexible seat-based pricing

next_steps: Schedule discovery call with Ruby and Amara
Send security questionnaire for technical review

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Ruby diving into specific forecasting pain points and automation use cases. Ruby shared they're currently using Gong for call recording but need better deal-level insights. Discussed unlimited automation tier for their workflow complexity.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current weekly forecast review process
questions_asked.answer: AEs update Salesforce by Friday, Ruby manually reviews 40+ deals, builds spreadsheet for Monday exec review

questions_asked.question: What's included in unlimited automation vs standard tier?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited workflows, custom integrations, and advanced AI scoring vs 10 workflows on standard

questions_asked.question: How does this work alongside Gong?
questions_asked.answer: We pull conversation data from Gong API to enrich deal health scores

next_steps: Prepare custom demo showing CloudSpark's Salesforce data

touches.ai_summary: Product demo with Ruby and Amara showcasing Salesforce integration, deal health scoring, and automated forecast rollups. Amara asked detailed questions about data security and API capabilities. Ruby expressed strong interest in unlimited automation tier. Discussed competitive landscape with Gong briefly.

questions_asked.question: What's your current deal volume per quarter?
questions_asked.answer: About 120 opportunities, 25-30 typically in commit stage

questions_asked.question: Is data encrypted at rest and in transit?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, SOC 2 Type II certified with AES-256 encryption

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the deal health algorithm for our sales cycle?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, fully configurable weighting and custom fields

questions_asked.question: What's the implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 2-3 weeks for full Salesforce integration and team onboarding

objections: Amara mentioned they're also evaluating Gong Revenue Intelligence - need to understand differentiation
next_steps: Amara to complete technical evaluation checklist
Schedule follow-up call to review pricing options

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call with Ruby reviewing pricing for 10 seats on unlimited automation tier. Presented $10,925 ACV standard pricing. Ruby pushed back on budget constraints and mentioned Gong's competitive pricing. Discussed potential discount to close before month-end.

questions_asked.question: What budget range were you expecting?
questions_asked.answer: We were hoping to stay under $7,000 for the first year

questions_asked.question: Can you match Gong's pricing for their revenue intelligence package?
questions_asked.answer: Our solutions solve different problems, but I can work with my manager on a discount for a quick close

objections: Pricing is higher than expected based on Gong's quote
next_steps: Rep to get approval for discount to $6,500 ACV

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Ruby with revised proposal at $6,500 ACV (40.5% discount) for 10 seats, unlimited automation tier, valid through end of month. Ruby confirmed the pricing works and wants to move forward.

questions_asked.question: Is the discount locked in for multi-year if we expand?
questions_asked.answer: First year discount applies, renewal pricing at standard rates unless we negotiate expansion

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment call with Ruby to finalize contract terms and confirm implementation plan. Ruby confirmed Amara completed technical review successfully. Discussed success metrics and quarterly business reviews. No other executives from CloudSpark joined the call.

questions_asked.question: Should we include your VP of Sales or CFO in the final sign-off?
questions_asked.answer: I have budget authority for this amount, but I'll loop in my VP after we sign

questions_asked.question: What's the cancellation policy if it doesn't meet our forecast accuracy goals?
questions_asked.answer: 30-day notice after first 90 days, but we're confident in hitting your targets

next_steps: Ruby to route contract to procurement
Target signature by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Ruby checking on contract status with procurement. Ruby responded that legal is reviewing terms and should have feedback within 48 hours. Confirmed still on track to close this month.
